### Bug Description
A clear and precise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See the error

### Expected Behaviour
What did you expect to happen?

### Actual Behaviour
What happened instead?

### Screenshots
If relevant, add screenshots here.

### Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- Version: [e.g. 1.2.3]

### Priority
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low
